/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/LLMEngine.cpp.o -o main  -Wl,-rpath,/home/thesupercd/Documents/LLM_Application/build/bin bin/libllama.so.0.0.1 -lreadline bin/libggml.so.0.10.0 bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.10.0 bin/libggml-base.so.0.10.0
